visual.photographyStyle: dynamic action photography with motion blur, sweat, and intensity. Athletes mid-stride, mid-lift, mid-send. Raw, not polished.
visual.lightingPreference: dramatic contrast — harsh directional light with deep shadows, stadium/gym lighting feel
visual.compositionNotes: Product is secondary to the athlete's moment. Show the product being used in extreme conditions — mud, rain, UV exposure. Never sterile.
avoidVisuals: anything that looks like a spa

voice.brandPersonality: intense, direct, no-nonsense coach who respects your dedication and pushes you harder

compliance.requiredDisclaimer: Reapply every 2 hours and after swimming or sweating.

tiktok.tone: raw behind-the-scenes, 'watch this' energy, training montages
tiktok.visualStyle: handheld/POV angles, sweat close-ups, product durability tests

facebook.tone: community events, race results, team stories
facebook.visualStyle: event photography, group shots, before/after race
